calibration_anchor_policy: A particle used to calibrate the unit scale is not an independent prediction in that run.
prediction_policy: Predictions are conditional on declared geometry, equation, and calibration.
upper_limit_policy: Electron-neutrino comparison is upper-limit based unless a vetted central reference is explicitly supplied.
open_theorem_policy: Open-theorem entries are blockers and cannot be reported as production-ready predictions.
runtime_validation_policy: Runtime-disabled software entries remain gated until live external tools pass their declared checks.
pdg_policy: The pdg package is optional; offline provenance-tagged fallbacks are used without network access.
allowed_claims: BHSM provides a Python prediction registry interface.
The registry separates calibration, prediction, comparison, blocker, and software-gate states.
CKM and PMNS source matrices are exposed as existing internal artifacts.
forbidden_claims: A calibration anchor is an independent prediction in the same run.
The electron-neutrino fallback is a central measured mass.
